Forest.description: Lush green forests full of life and creativity.

Mountain.description: Tall, rugged peaks that build toughness and focus.

Ocean.description: Deep blue waters that reward adaptability and wisdom.

Desert.description: Harsh and dry lands that test endurance.

City.description: Busy urban environments full of people and ideas.

Tundra.description: Cold, quiet lands that require patience and strength.

Volcano.description: Fiery and dangerous lands that create bold creatures.

Plains.description: Wide open grasslands that favor speed and balance.
